title: Atul Projects is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Atul Projects is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Atul Projects has an exciting opening for a Senior Property Advisor at our Vijayawada office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Atul Projects:
Atul Projects is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Atul Projects!
